svg.title: Infath CXM voice-tier reference architecture
svg.desc: A layered architecture: customer channels feed KSA carrier SIP trunks into a Kamailio SBC edge, then a FreeSWITCH media cluster that streams audio to a real-time AI voice layer (Arabic STT, LLM, TTS), connected to the CXM application tier and an underlying data, recording and PDPL/NDMO compliance layer.

g.text: SIP edge / SBC — Kamailio or OpenSIPS
Media & call control — FreeSWITCH cluster (Asterisk ARI alternative)
Real-time AI voice — streamed via mod_audio_fork
